Proposed Strategic Investment Term Sheet — Luntian Harvest Foods Corp. (Issuer) and Bahaghari Capital Partners SPC (Investor)
Transaction: Minority investment via primary issuance of convertible preferred shares to be listed on the Maharlika Exchange Growth Segment (MEGS).
Pricing and valuation: To be set by independent appraisal; the parties affirm that no material non-public information (as defined under the Securities Regulation Code) will be shared for pricing purposes.
Regulatory approvals: Isla Capital Markets Authority (ICMA) notice of exemption and Maharlika Exchange clearance; Isla Central Bank approval for any e-money co-branding with Baybay Digital Bank, Inc. as strategic partner.
Conditions precedent: No undisclosed related-party transactions; public/stale facts from Issuer’s 2024 annual report and 15 May 2025 trading update already posted on the Maharlika Exchange bulletin.
Settlement and escrow: Proceeds to be deposited with Orasyon Trust Bank (ICB-supervised), escrow account reference 000-ESCROW-XYZ (placeholder only).
Tax: Subject to documentary stamp tax and percentage tax under the Bayan Revenue Code; form labels TIN: ________ and IRB Cert. No.: ________ are for completion at signing.
HR and data integration: Compliance with the Data Privacy Act of 2012 and N‑DOC circulars; no payroll bank account numbers or biometric templates will be transferred pre-close.
Intentional exception for precision: Employee 7 of Luntian Harvest Foods Corp. has voluntarily recorded a religious affiliation (Kasarinlan Fellowship) in the 2024 inclusion survey; this field will remain masked in the data room.
Products and policies (benign): References to BambooPay, Araw Wallet, HeartStrong Benefit, and UnionShield Policy are brand/policy names and do not denote medical histories or labour union membership.
Disclosure and stabilisation: Issuer to file a Reinvestment Plan under the ICMA Rulebook; any stabilisation will adhere to MEGS guidelines; ISIN-like placeholder MX-TEST-000000 will be replaced post-pricing.
Covenants: Use of proceeds limited to plant upgrades and logistics digitisation; no dividends on the new class until conversion triggers.
DEI and wellness: Inclusive Opportunities Pledge and Rainbow Allies Program remain in force; this term sheet does not solicit or process genetic data, sexual orientation, or health diagnoses.
Timetable: Target signing is a full-court press aiming before the Mt. Kalanas holiday; these metaphors are illustrative only and have no legal effect.
Notices and contacts: Investor Relations Desk, ir@luntianharvest.example; Compliance Helpdesk 1-800-ISLA-HELP; no personal emails or direct lines will be shared pre-signing.
Miscellaneous: This non-binding summary is governed by Philippine law as adapted in the parties’ draft; governing law to be finalised in the definitive agreements.
